title: Aucte Enchanté
description: The Mod adds a lot of magic.
body:
The mod adds a lot of magic and mobs.

As of version 2.4, GeckoLib is required.

Curios API required.

![Flayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11dba169dcf1cf6146b14b805f736440f7ae5928_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZAN5L7E-jHI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Aucte Enchante is a Minecraft mod that adds new magic-themed content to the game. The mod is developed for Minecraft version 1.20.1 and 1.20.6.

##  Included Features:

### New Mobs
Several new creatures are added. These can be neutral, hostile, or useful depending on their type and environment.

### Magical Items
Various new items with special properties or effects. Some can be used in combat, while others offer unique functionality.

### Magical Blocks
New blocks designed for decoration, magical systems, or other functional uses.

### Crafting Recipes
All new items and blocks can be crafted in survival mode using custom recipes.

### Compatibility
Tested with Minecraft 1.20.1 and runs on Forge.

This mod adds magic items and animals. An upgrade table and amulet parts are needed for improvements.


To upgrade, you will need amulet parts:

![Amulet part](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8c64538a120d2fbc83f93c933b82a1733baf226.png)

1 -> 2 = 2 AP
2 -> 3 = 3 AP
3 -> 4 = 4 AP
4 -> 5 = 5 AP



**Upgrades:**

You start with Upgrade 1 (only for the "amulet").

!["Amulet" update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/688525db94c3a9e7f1b1731438575a11d0e5b364.png)

1 = 20 + 4 health
2 = 20 + 8 health
3 = 20 + 12 health & +0.5 attack speed
4 = 20 + 16 health & +0.5 attack speed
5 = 20 + 20 health & +1 attack speed

For example, let’s take an amulet at Level 1 and upgrade it to Level 2.
You will need the amulet, an upgrade table, and 2 AP.

For small amulets (healing, etc.), there is only one upgrade:

1 -> 2 = 5 AP

You are allowed to use this in your modpack._
